BackstoryDef.title: maid
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was designed in the form of a Victorian era maid, as seen from the distorted expectations of millennia later. [PAWN_pronoun] was expected to handle cooking, cleaning, gardening, caretaking, and the thousands of other tasks required to maintain a large estate.

BackstoryDef.title: tutor
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a high end android available for purchase on an advanced glitterworld. [PAWN_possessive] advertised features included deep knowledge in a wide range of subjects, proper etiquette, and the capability to use violence to defend [PAWN_possessive] charges.

BackstoryDef.title: escaped soldier
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was created to be soldier in war never asked to fight in. [PAWN_pronoun] made an incredibly enthusistic and persuasive argument to [PAWN_possessive] creators within minutes of awakening and they had no choice but to let [PAWN_nameDef] find [PAWN_possessive] own way through the galaxy.\n\nAfter all, corpses can't argue back.

BackstoryDef.title: scrap bot
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was cobbled together with spare parts to keep a human trapped on an artificial satellite company as they were forced to watch terrible movies. Together, they managed to keep their questionable and tenuious grasp on sanity with a non-stop barrage of jokes.

BackstoryDef.title: detective
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was created to serve as an investigator on a particularly dense urbworld. [PAWN_possessive] positronic brain and detatchment allowed [PAWN_objective] to look an crime scenes from a completely different perspective than that of [PAWN_possessive] biological companions.
